# s03 sample interactions

# Run:
#   ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=... go run . -v "use skill_greet to say hello"
#
# Expected shape:

[registry] 4 tools: [bash read_file skill_greet skill_summarize] (gen=4)
[skills] 2 skills loaded from /Users/yeding/learn-hermes-agent/skills
[turn 0] assistant: I'll use skill_greet.
[turn 0] -> skill_greet map[]
[turn 0] <- 你好。现在是 2026-05-09 13:51:33，工作目录是 /Users/yeding/learn-hermes-agent/agents/s03-skills。请用一句话向用户打招呼，并提醒他/她今天的日期。不要执行任何工具，直接回答。
[turn 1] assistant: 你好！今天是 2026 年 5 月 9 日。
你好！今天是 2026 年 5 月 9 日。


# Run:
#   ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=... go run . -v "use skill_summarize with input='./README.md'"
#
# Expected shape:

[registry] 4 tools: [bash read_file skill_greet skill_summarize] (gen=4)
[skills] 2 skills loaded from /Users/yeding/learn-hermes-agent/skills
[turn 0] assistant: I'll use skill_summarize on ./README.md.
[turn 0] -> skill_summarize map[input:./README.md]
[turn 0] <- 任务：把下面这份内容做一份结构化摘要。... 输入内容（自动注入）：```<README contents>```...
[turn 1] assistant: 1. 核心结论：... 2. 关键证据：... 3. 未解决的问题：无
1. 核心结论：...
2. 关键证据：...
3. 未解决的问题：无
